landingPage.title: Landing Page
landingPage.description: Represents a single landing page created by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the landing page.

ownerId.description: The ID of the user who owns this page.

pageName.description: The internal name of the landing page.

slug.description: The URL-friendly slug for the public page.

status.description: The current status of the page.

template.description: The ID of the template used for this page.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the page was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the page was last updated.

publishedAt.description: Timestamp when the page was published.

lead.title: Lead
lead.description: Represents a lead captured from a landing page form.

pageId.description: The ID of the page where the lead was captured.

ownerId.description: The ID of the user who owns the page.

/landingPages/{landingPageId}.description: Stores all landing pages created by users.

/users/{userId}/leads/{leadId}.description: Stores leads collected by a specific user.
